title: Adult Mouse Pancreas Cell Dissociation on Ice
author: Andrew Potter
materials: Dissect pancreas and place in ice-cold PBS.

steps.title: Mince tissue thoroughly on petri dish...
steps.instruction: Mince tissue thoroughly on petri dish on ice (2 min) until fine paste. 00:02:00, mince on ice

steps.title: Weigh out 18 mg tissue and...
steps.instruction: Weigh out 18 mg tissue and add to tube with 1 mL Type 4 collagenase enzyme mix. undetermined, minced pancreas tissue

steps.title: Incubate on ice
steps.instruction: Incubate on ice. Shake vigorously every 30 seconds for the first two min to re-suspend tissue. 00:00:30, shake vigorously for first 2 min

steps.title: At two mins, begin triturating 10x every min
steps.instruction: At two mins, begin triturating 10x every min. Continue triturating on ice for 20 min. 00:20:00, triturate on ice

steps.title: After incubating 20 min, let chunks...
steps.instruction: After incubating 20 min, let chunks settle for 1 min on ice. 00:01:00, let chunks settle

steps.title: Pipet top 75% (750 µL) of...
steps.instruction: Pipet top 75% (750 µL) of supernatant containing released cells onto a 30 µM filter on a 50 mL conical, on ice. undetermined, save supernatant

steps.title: Rinse filter with 5 mL ice-cold PBS/BSA 0
steps.instruction: Rinse filter with 5 mL ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04%. Save filter and flow-through for next steps. undetermined, ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04%

steps.title: To residual tissue chunks add additional...
steps.instruction: To residual tissue chunks add additional 1 mL type 4 collagenase enzyme mix. undetermined, type 4 collagenase mix

steps.title: Continue triturating on ice 10x every...
steps.instruction: Continue triturating on ice 10x every min for 30 additional min (50 min total digest time). 00:30:00, triturate on ice

steps.title: Triturate and add entire volume to...
steps.instruction: Triturate and add entire volume to same 30 µM filter on 50 mL conical. Rinse filter w/5 mL ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04%. undetermined, ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04%

steps.title: Transfer flow-through to 15 mL conical
steps.instruction: Transfer flow-through to 15 mL conical. Spin 300 g for 5 min at 4 °C. 00:05:00, spin 300 g at 4 °C

steps.title: Remove supernatant and re-suspend in 100 µL ice-cold PBS/BSA 0
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant and re-suspend in 100 µL ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04%.

steps.title: Add 900 µL RBC lysis buffer
steps.instruction: Add 900 µL RBC lysis buffer. Triturate 20x and incubate 2 min. on ice. 00:02:00, incubate on ice

steps.title: Add 10 mL ice-cold PBS/BSA 0
steps.instruction: Add 10 mL ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04% to dilute RBC lysis buffer.

steps.title: Spin 300 g for 5 min at 4 °C
steps.instruction: Spin 300 g for 5 min at 4 °C. Remove supernatant. 00:05:00, spin 300 g

steps.title: Re-suspend in 100 µL ice-cold PBS/BSA 0
steps.instruction: Re-suspend in 100 µL ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04%. Analyze viability and yield using a hemocytometer with trypan blue. Adjust concentration to 1,000 cells/µL for Chromium or 1,000 cells/µL for DropSeq. undetermined, ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04%
